quote: If you're in Istanbul, craving a kahvaltı with a side of breathtaking views, My Terrace Café in Sultanahmet is the ultimate spot.
author: Travel creator

quote: Whether you want breakfast, lunch, dinner, add My Terrace to your list when visiting Istanbul. Good food enjoyed above the bustle, overlooking the old town and across the Sea of Marmara.
author: Travel blogger

quote: Spent a lovely evening at My Terrace in Istanbul. The food was delicious and the views were incredible.
author: Visitor from the UK

quote: Must do in Istanbul: have a Turkish breakfast on a rooftop with the hungry seagulls and the whole old town in front of you.
author: Travel creator

quote: Our first breakfast in Istanbul had to be a Turkish breakfast — made even better by this view.
author: Traveler

quote: La mejor vista de Estambul. The best view in Istanbul, hands down.
author: Visitor from Latin America
